Every story sounds beautiful until you live it.
Not all rivers want to reach the sea.
Letting go is not a single act. It's a small choice you make a hundred times.
Time doesn't heal. It teaches you to carry it differently.
Maybe peace is just being okay with the wait.
We are mostly the silences between the things we say.
Not everything that's quiet is calm.
Some endings are kind enough to feel like beginnings.
Not every goodbye needs a reason. Some just need acceptance.
